messages.subject: [R--gR] gR task view
messages.body_plain:
>>>>> Claus Dethlefsen / Aalborg Sygehus writes:

> Dear all

> I have tried to put together a "task view" (new invention on CRAN)
> concerning gRaphical models. You can check out the view at
> http://cran.r-project.org/src/contrib/Views/gR.html. If you have
> comments, omissions etc. please contact me and I will adjust the task
> view. Currently, the package 'mathgraph' is not available on CRAN, but
> hopefully will reappear soon.

We need a new maintainer who makes the package pass R CMD check again (a
minimal change, though).

-k
 
> For more on task views, see the new issue of Rnews available on the R
> homepage www.r-project.org.
 
> Best to all,
> Claus

> ________________________________

> Claus Dethlefsen, Msc, PhD
> Statistiker ved Kardiovaskul?rt Forskningscenter
